source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/15_규격 Test/5.1. REP031070 [A1417MCW, F1417MCW] (Wireless) EMC Test report_A1.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Amendment 1 EMC Test Report REP031070 for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector model F1417MCW with variant model A1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Updates the test standard version without testing due to customer request, referencing basic report NK-22-E-0812.
keyPoints: The product category is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
The test was conducted with F1417MCW model.
Amendment 1 was issued due to test standards update in accordance with customer request.
The report states no technical deviations between specified older and updated EN 301 489-3 and EN 301 489-17 versions.
The manufacturer is responsible to Competent Authorities in Europe for modifications resulting in non-compliance.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Company Name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.; 1.2 Manufacturer Company Name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

entities.name: Nemko Korea
entities.evidence: This form is only for use by Nemko Korea, or by others according to special agreement with Nemko Korea.

concepts.name: Test standard version update without testing
concepts.pageTarget: Test Standard Version Update Without Testing
concepts.evidence: We hereby update the test standard version without testing.

evidence.claim: The document is EMC Test Report Amendment 1 with project reference number REP031070.
evidence.evidenceText: EMC Test Report Amendment 1 EMC Test Report Project Reference No. REP031070

evidence.claim: The issued date of Amendment 1 is March 07, 2024.
The product is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The model is F1417MCW and the variant model is A1417MCW.
The test was conducted with F1417MCW model.
evidence.evidenceText: Remark: The test was conducted with F1417MCW model.

evidence.claim: The applicant and manufacturer are H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: 1.1 Applicant Company Name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.; 1.2 Manufacturer Company Name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The report was tested according to EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3:2019, EN 301 489-3 V2.3.2:2023, and EN 301 489-17 V3.2.6:2023.
This test report amends previous report NK-22-E-0812.
evidence.evidenceText: This test report amend previous report no. NK-22-E-0812 (Basic Report).

evidence.claim: The basic report NK-22-E-0812 was issued October 04, 2022.
Amendment 1 was issued due to a test standards update in accordance with customer request.
evidence.evidenceText: Due to test standards update in accordance with customer’s request, we issue the test report No. REP031070.

evidence.claim: The reference test report is NK-22-E-0812.
evidence.evidenceText: The reference test report is NK-22-E-0812.

evidence.claim: The report states there are no technical deviations for the product between specified EN 301 489-3 and EN 301 489-17 standard versions.
evidence.evidenceText: The following standards, there are no technical deviations for this product : - between EN 301 489-3 V2.1.1:2019 and EN 301 489-3 V2.3.2:2023 - between EN 301 489-17 V3.2.4:2020 and EN 301 489-17 V3.2.6:2023

evidence.claim: The test standard version was updated without testing.
evidence.evidenceText: We hereby update the test standard version without testing.
evidence.pageTarget: Test Standard Version Update Without Testing

evidence.claim: The EUT rated voltage is DC 16 V, 3 A and tested voltage is DC 16 V.
evidence.evidenceText: Rated Voltage: DC 16 V, 3 A Tested Voltage & Power Frequency: DC 16 V

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is responsible to Competent Authorities in Europe for modifications resulting in non-compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: The manufacturer is responsible to the Competent Authorities in Europe for any modifications made to the product which results in non-compliance to the relevant regulation.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is ambiguous: the text mentions Competent Authorities in Europe but does not name a specific regulator or notified body.
Variant evidence is potentially conflicting: the report lists Variant Model A1417MCW, but the variants covered/model distinction table shows N/A N/A.
Serial Number is listed as N/A.
